mapper.insert: INSERT INTO OZZY.ADD_EMOTION (ADD_EMOTION_SEQ, EMOTIONS, CREATE_AT, UPDATE_AT) VALUES(OZZY.ADD_EMOTION_SEQ.NEXTVAL ,#{emotion} ,sysdate ,sysdate)
mapper.select: SELECT T2.EMOTIONS AS emotions FROM OZZY.DIARY T1 INNER JOIN OZZY.ADD_EMOTION T2 ON T1.DIARY_EMOTION_SEQ = T2.ADD_EMOTION_SEQ WHERE 1=1 AND T1.USER_SEQ = #{userSeq} AND T1.DIARY_DATE = TO_DATE(#{todayDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
